listings.description: Property DescriptionTop Floor Apartment with Iconic Sydney ViewsOn the eastern side of Victoria Road, facing Renwick Street at the rear and with northeast outlooks to the water, city skyline and Sydney Harbour Bridge, this spacious modern apartment provides serene elevation with a private aspect and spectacular views. The apartment occupies a quiet top floor position in 'The Drummoyne', a prestigious security building featuring just 17 private residences, and combines sleek designer interiors with a generous terrace and balcony, secure parking and proximity to all the amenities Drummoyne has to offer. Located in the heart of the village close to shops and cafes, Harris Farm Markets, Church Street Laneway eateries and city buses, it's also just 750m from the Bay Run at Brett Park and 1.0km from Drummoyne Wharf for frequent ferries to Barangaroo and Circular Quay.- Intercom security, lift access and ducted r/c air conditioning throughout- Open living-dining and covered northeast terrace with amazing views- Views include Spectacle/Cockatoo Islands, city and northern skylines- Modern stone kitchen with s/steel appliances, gas and ample storage- Bedrooms have built-in wardrobes, ceiling fans and harbour views from balcony- Fully tiled rain shower ensuite and main bathroom, Euro-style laundry- Stylish floating floorboards to living areas and carpet in both bedrooms- Access via Renwick St to secure parking for two cars and storage cage- Generous visitor parking spaces, city buses footsteps from the building- 160m from Harris Farm Markets, 250m to Church St Laneway precinct- 750m Birkenhead Pt and Bay Run, 1.0km to Drummoyne Ferry WharfRead less
